title: Tax Document Extraction — Secure Flowchart
subtitle: Paperless folder discovery → Textract OCR → sanitize + safety gate → page selector → document-specific extraction → validation → OcrTaxTable save.

nodes.label: Start
nodes.description: User runs tax extraction from Paperless viewer.

nodes.label: RunTaxDocumentExtraction
nodes.description: Primary WebMethod. RunTaxOcr / RunTaxOcrV2 remain compatibility shims.

nodes.label: Target folder?
nodes.description: Personal Tax Returns / Current or EmpName / Current

nodes.label: Skip / no-op
nodes.description: Non-target Paperless folders are ignored.

nodes.label: AWS upload API
nodes.description: POST /ocr/tax-document-extraction/upload; compat: /ocr/tax-v2/upload

nodes.label: S3 + Textract
nodes.description: PDF goes only to OCR. PDF is never sent to GPT.

nodes.label: Sanitize Layout JSON
nodes.description: Mask SSN before model use. Keep only last 4 digits.

nodes.label: Full SSN remains?
nodes.description: ContainsFullSsn check

nodes.label: Block GPT call
nodes.description: Fail closed until selected Layout JSON is sanitized.

nodes.label: Rule-based page selector
nodes.description: Classifies and selects page groups. Only selected sanitized pages go onward.

nodes.label: Document type?
nodes.description: W2 / Schedule C / 1065 / 1120-1120C / 1120S / Unknown

nodes.label: W2
nodes.description: W2 pages → W2 schema fields.

nodes.label: Schedule C
nodes.description: Multiple schedules return data_items for separate OcrTaxTable rows.
Ordinary income from other partnerships = lines 5 + 6 + 7.

nodes.label: 1120 / 1120C
nodes.description: Gain/loss = lines 8 + 9; other income = line 10. 1120C dividends bypassed.

nodes.label: 1120S
nodes.description: Other Deductions statement selected when amortization is present.

nodes.label: Unknown / unsupported
nodes.description: No extraction GPT call; return reason for manual review.

nodes.label: Selected JSON contract
nodes.description: GPT adapters receive sanitized selected Layout JSON + schema prompt only.

nodes.label: Validate response
nodes.description: Schema validators and helper checks reject unsafe/impossible values.

nodes.label: Structured API response
nodes.description: Returns structured JSON / data_items to NPress caller.

nodes.label: Save OcrTaxTable
nodes.description: Insert extracted fields + sanitized ExtractedJson. No full SSN stored.

nodes.label: CashFlow later
nodes.description: Map to Rec* / Prev* later using TaxPeriod.

nodes.label: Manual review
nodes.description: Unsupported/blocked documents surface a reason instead of unsafe extraction.

nodes.label: Federal Statement rule
nodes.description: For 1065, 1120/1120C, and 1120S: amortization comes only from clearly labeled statement row(s), not the Other Deductions total.
